title: document CAP_SYS_ADMIN required for systemd PrivateNetwork
body:
Replaces https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/6682

Signed-off-by: James Cassell <code@james.cassell.me>
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>
